---
title: "Portfolio Construction and Evaluation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-15"
---
  
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```   


```{r}
#load library
library(fredr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(zoo) 
library(lubridate)
library(data.table)
library(hdm)
library(glmnet)
library(forecast)
library(readxl)
library(urca)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)

```

THIINGS TO DO BEFORE U CLICK RUN ALL
1. make sure final_data.csv is in ../data/
2. Make sure u have qqq_returns.csv in ../data/
3. replace model code with ur own code (replace dummy_model and the model name after the function when running the expanding window)

```{r}
#read in data
file_path = "../data/final_data.csv"
df = read.csv(file_path)

# this function helps to construct a df that stores all the top decile crsp_fundno for every year between 2020 to 2025
# and also a df that stores all the predicted alphas for every fund
build_top_decile_history <- function(model_fn,
                                     entire_df,
                                     date_col = "caldt",
                                     fund_col = "crsp_fundno",
                                     test_start_year = 2020,
                                     test_end_year = 2025) {
  
  # ensure date is Date type
  df <- entire_df %>%
    mutate(
      !!date_col := as.Date(.data[[date_col]])
    ) %>%
    arrange(.data[[date_col]])
  
  # store yearly outputs
  all_predictions_list <- list()
  all_top_decile_list <- list()
  
  # loop over each out-of-sample test year
  for (yr in test_start_year:test_end_year) {
    
    # Expanding window:
    # forecast for most recent year
    train_cutoff <- as.Date(paste0(yr, "-12-31"))
    
    train_df <- df %>%
      filter(.data[[date_col]] <= train_cutoff)
    
    train_df_std <- train_df %>%
      mutate(year = year(caldt)) %>%
      group_by(year) %>%
      mutate(across(
        .cols = where(is.numeric) & !any_of(c("year", "crsp_fundno", "alpha_ann")),   # standardize all numeric except year,
        .fns  = ~ {                                                                    # and target variable
          mu <- mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
          sdv <- sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
          z <- (.x - mu) / sdv
          z[is.na(z)] <- 0  # impute na values with 0 (alpha_ann has NA rows removed already), following demiguel logic
          z
        }
      )) %>%
      ungroup() %>% select(-year)
    
    # call model. Model output a df that contains evaluation_year, crsp_fundno, predicted_alpha for every single fund
    model_output <- model_fn(train_df_std)
    
    model_output <- model_output %>%
      select(
        evaluation_year,
        !!fund_col,
        predicted_alpha
      ) %>%
      distinct()
    
    all_predictions_list[[as.character(yr)]] <- model_output
    
    
    # keep only top 10% within each evaluation year x rebalance date
    top_decile_output <- model_output %>%
      group_by(evaluation_year) %>%
      arrange(desc(predicted_alpha), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
      mutate(
        rank = row_number(),
        n_funds = n(),
        cutoff = ceiling(0.10 * n_funds)
      ) %>%
      filter(rank <= cutoff) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(evaluation_year, !!fund_col, predicted_alpha)
    
    all_top_decile_list[[as.character(yr)]] <- top_decile_output
  }
  
  # combine across years
  all_predictions <- bind_rows(all_predictions_list) %>%
    arrange(evaluation_year, desc(predicted_alpha))
  
  top_decile_history <- bind_rows(all_top_decile_list) %>%
    arrange(evaluation_year,  desc(predicted_alpha))
  
  # return both
  return(list(
    all_predictions = all_predictions,
    top_decile_history = top_decile_history
  ))
}
```

# Random Forest function
```{r}
predict_alpha_rf <- function(df, target = "alpha_ann") {
  df <- df %>% mutate(caldt = as.Date(caldt)) %>% drop_na()
  features <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann"))
  n_feats   <- length(features)
  pred_year <- max(year(df$caldt))
  
  train <- df[year(df$caldt) <  pred_year, ] # take all years before pred year to train
  test  <- df[year(df$caldt) == pred_year, ]
  
  # Hyperparameter Tuning
  
  n_years <- sort(unique(year(train$caldt)))
  cutoff  <- n_years[floor(length(n_years) * 0.7)]
  tune_train <- train[year(train$caldt) <= cutoff, ]
  tune_val   <- train[year(train$caldt) >  cutoff, ]

  grid <- expand.grid(
    ntree = c(200, 500, 1000),
    mtry  = c(floor(sqrt(n_feats)), floor(n_feats/3), floor(n_feats/2)),
    nodesize = c(1, 5, 10)
  )

  grid$mse <- sapply(seq_len(nrow(grid)), function(i) {
    set.seed(100 + i)
    m <- randomForest(
      x = tune_train[, features],
      y = tune_train[[target]],
      ntree = grid$ntree[i],
      mtry  = grid$mtry[i],
      nodesize = grid$nodesize[i]
    )
    preds <- predict(m, newdata = tune_val[, features])
    mean((tune_val[[target]] - preds)^2)
  })

  best <- grid[which.min(grid$mse), ]
  set.seed(42)
  model <- randomForest(
    x = train[, features],
    y = train[[target]],
    ntree = best$ntree,
    mtry = best$mtry,
    nodesize = best$nodesize
  )
  
  preds <- predict(model, newdata = test[, features])
  
  mse <- mean((test[[target]] - preds)^2)
  
  #print best parameters for feature importance function
  cat(sprintf("RF Year %d: best mtry=%.2f, ntree=%d, nodesize=%d| MSE: %.4f\n", 
              pred_year, best$mtry, best$ntree, best$nodesize, mse))

  results <- data.frame(
    evaluation_year = pred_year,
    crsp_fundno = test$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha  = preds
  )

  return(results)
}

# call the function
results <- build_top_decile_history(
  model_fn = predict_alpha_rf,           #==================CHANGE MODEL NAME HERE ==========================
  entire_df = df
)

# all_predictions can be used to do dm test, rmse etc
all_predictions <- results$all_predictions

#helper function to get top x% funds
select_top_fraction <- function(pred_df, top_frac) {
  pred_df %>%
    group_by(evaluation_year) %>%
    arrange(desc(predicted_alpha), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(
      rank = row_number(),
      n_funds = n(),
      cutoff = ceiling(top_frac * n_funds)
    ) %>%
    filter(rank <= cutoff) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(evaluation_year, crsp_fundno, predicted_alpha)
}

top_5_history <- select_top_fraction(all_predictions, 0.05)
top_10_history <- select_top_fraction(all_predictions, 0.10)
top_25_history <- select_top_fraction(all_predictions, 0.25)
top_50_history <- select_top_fraction(all_predictions, 0.50)

# top 10% funds
top_decile_history <- top_10_history

# save these predictions in csv for RMSE, DM test 
df_for_dm_test <- df %>%
  mutate(
    caldt = as.Date(caldt),
    evaluation_year = year(caldt)
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    all_predictions,
    by = c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno")
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    caldt = caldt,
    fundno = crsp_fundno,
    actual_alpha = alpha_ann,
    predicted_alpha = predicted_alpha
  ) %>%
  arrange(caldt, fundno)
write.csv(df_for_dm_test, "df_for_dm_test.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# this df is used to construct the portfolio
top_decile_history <- results$top_decile_history
```

Constructing portfolio of mutual funds
```{r}
# map the top decile funds to their monthly returns

df_monthly_returns = read.csv("../data/tech_monthly_returns.csv")

# filter to just 2019 to 2024
df_monthly_returns = df_monthly_returns %>% mutate(caldt = dmy(caldt)) %>% filter(year(caldt) >= 2020, year(caldt) <= 2025)

# map monthly returns back to the selected funds
top_5_with_returns <- top_5_history %>%
  left_join(
    df_monthly_returns %>%
      mutate(evaluation_year = year(caldt)),
    by = c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno")
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-c(crsp_fundno, caldt), as.numeric))

top_10_with_returns <- top_10_history %>%
  left_join(
    df_monthly_returns %>%
      mutate(evaluation_year = year(caldt)),
    by = c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno")
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-c(crsp_fundno, caldt), as.numeric))

top_25_with_returns <- top_25_history %>%
  left_join(
    df_monthly_returns %>%
      mutate(evaluation_year = year(caldt)),
    by = c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno")
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-c(crsp_fundno, caldt), as.numeric))

top_50_with_returns <- top_50_history %>%
  left_join(
    df_monthly_returns %>%
      mutate(evaluation_year = year(caldt)),
    by = c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno")
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-c(crsp_fundno, caldt), as.numeric))

# all funds with returns (robustness check)
all_funds_with_returns <- all_predictions %>%
  left_join(
    df_monthly_returns %>%
      mutate(evaluation_year = year(caldt)),
    by = c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno")
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(-c(crsp_fundno, caldt), as.numeric))

# construct equally weighted portfolio, and if for any month, any funds go missing, liquidate and hold as cash

construct_long_only_fund_portfolio <- function(df,
                                               start_year = 2020,
                                               end_year = 2025,
                                               initial_equity = 1,
                                               buy_fee = 0.01,
                                               sell_fee = 0.01) {
  # Required columns
  required_cols <- c("evaluation_year", "crsp_fundno", "caldt", "mret")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  # Clean and prepare
  df_clean <- df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = caldt,
      evaluation_year = as.integer(evaluation_year),
      crsp_fundno = as.character(crsp_fundno),
      mret = as.numeric(mret),
      month_num = month(caldt),
      year_num = year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(evaluation_year, crsp_fundno, caldt)
  
  # If year range not specified, use full range in data
  if (is.null(start_year)) start_year <- min(df_clean$evaluation_year, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.null(end_year)) end_year <- max(df_clean$evaluation_year, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  years_to_run <- seq(start_year, end_year)
  
  portfolio_results <- list()
  equity_start_of_year <- initial_equity
  
  for (yr in years_to_run) {
    year_df <- df_clean %>%
      filter(evaluation_year == yr) %>%
      arrange(caldt, crsp_fundno)
    
    if (nrow(year_df) == 0) next
    
    # January universe = funds present in January of that evaluation year
    jan_df <- year_df %>% filter(month_num == 1)
    
    jan_funds <- unique(jan_df$crsp_fundno)
    N <- length(jan_funds)
    
    if (N == 0) {
      warning(paste("No January funds found for year", yr, "- skipping year"))
      next
    }
    
    # Use only funds that are actually in January
    year_df <- year_df %>%
      filter(crsp_fundno %in% jan_funds)
    
    # Monthly grid for that year
    months_in_year <- sort(unique(year_df$caldt))
    months_in_year <- months_in_year[year(months_in_year) == yr]
    
    # Start-of-year equal allocation after January buy fee
    invested_equity_after_buy_fee <- equity_start_of_year * (1 - buy_fee)
    initial_position_value <- invested_equity_after_buy_fee / N
    
    # Track per-fund state
    positions <- tibble(
      crsp_fundno = jan_funds,
      value = initial_position_value,
      alive = TRUE,
      in_cash = FALSE
    )
    
    year_results <- list()
    prev_total_equity <- equity_start_of_year
    
    for (dt in months_in_year) {
      month_data <- year_df %>%
        filter(caldt == dt) %>%
        select(crsp_fundno, mret)
      
      current_funds <- month_data$crsp_fundno
      
      # Funds that disappeared this month:
      # liquidate them immediately, pay sell fee, then hold as cash
      disappeared_funds <- positions$crsp_fundno[positions$alive & !(positions$crsp_fundno %in% current_funds)]
      
      if (length(disappeared_funds) > 0) {
        positions <- positions %>%
          mutate(
            value = ifelse(
              crsp_fundno %in% disappeared_funds & alive,
              value * (1 - sell_fee),
              value
            ),
            alive = ifelse(crsp_fundno %in% disappeared_funds, FALSE, alive),
            in_cash = ifelse(crsp_fundno %in% disappeared_funds, TRUE, in_cash)
          )
      }
      
      # Apply returns only to funds observed this month and still alive
      positions <- positions %>%
        left_join(month_data, by = "crsp_fundno") %>%
        mutate(
          value = case_when(
            alive & !is.na(mret) ~ value * (1 + mret),
            TRUE ~ value
          )
        ) %>%
        select(crsp_fundno, value, alive, in_cash)
      
      total_equity_before_sell_fee <- sum(positions$value, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      # December sell fee on surviving invested positions only
      total_equity_after_sell_fee <- total_equity_before_sell_fee
      if (month(as_date(dt)) == 12) {
        invested_mask <- positions$alive
        invested_value_dec <- sum(positions$value[invested_mask], na.rm = TRUE)
        
        if (invested_value_dec > 0) {
          fee_amount <- invested_value_dec * sell_fee
          
          positions <- positions %>%
            mutate(
              value = ifelse(alive, value * (1 - sell_fee), value)
            )
          
          total_equity_after_sell_fee <- sum(positions$value, na.rm = TRUE)
        }
      }
      
      monthly_return <- (total_equity_after_sell_fee / prev_total_equity) - 1
      
      year_results[[length(year_results) + 1]] <- tibble(
        caldt = as.Date(dt),
        evaluation_year = yr,
        portfolio_equity = total_equity_after_sell_fee,
        portfolio_return = monthly_return
      )
      
      prev_total_equity <- total_equity_after_sell_fee
    }
    
    year_results_df <- bind_rows(year_results)
    portfolio_results[[as.character(yr)]] <- year_results_df
    
    # Carry final December equity into next January
    equity_start_of_year <- tail(year_results_df$portfolio_equity, 1)
  }
  
  final_df <- bind_rows(portfolio_results) %>%
    arrange(caldt)
  
  return(final_df)
}

portfolio_top_5 <- construct_long_only_fund_portfolio(
  df = top_5_with_returns,
  start_year = 2020,
  end_year = 2025,
  initial_equity = 1,
  buy_fee = 0.01,
  sell_fee = 0.01
)

portfolio_top_10 <- construct_long_only_fund_portfolio(
  df = top_10_with_returns,
  start_year = 2020,
  end_year = 2025,
  initial_equity = 1,
  buy_fee = 0.01,
  sell_fee = 0.01
)

portfolio_top_25 <- construct_long_only_fund_portfolio(
  df = top_25_with_returns,
  start_year = 2020,
  end_year = 2025,
  initial_equity = 1,
  buy_fee = 0.01,
  sell_fee = 0.01
)

portfolio_top_50 <- construct_long_only_fund_portfolio(
  df = top_50_with_returns,
  start_year = 2020,
  end_year = 2025,
  initial_equity = 1,
  buy_fee = 0.01,
  sell_fee = 0.01
)

# robustness check: all funds, regardless of predicted alpha
portfolio_all_funds <- construct_long_only_fund_portfolio(
  df = all_funds_with_returns,
  start_year = 2020,
  end_year = 2025,
  initial_equity = 1,
  buy_fee = 0.01,
  sell_fee = 0.01
)

# use nasdaq etf as benchmark for returns
df_qqq = read.csv("../data/qqq_returns.csv")

df_qqq_daily <- df_qqq %>%
  mutate(
    Date = mdy(Date),
    Price = as.numeric(Price)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Date)

first_portfolio_date <- as.Date("2020-01-02")

buy_price <- df_qqq_daily %>%
  filter(Date == first_portfolio_date) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  pull(Price)

df_qqq_month_end <- df_qqq_daily %>%
  mutate(month = floor_date(Date, unit = "month")) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    caldt = Date,
    qqq_price = Price
  )

df_qqq_equity <- df_qqq_month_end %>%
  mutate(
    qqq_equity = qqq_price / buy_price
  ) %>%
  select(caldt, qqq_equity)

# combine top 10%, all funds, and qqq into one df for the first plot
df_equity_curves <- portfolio_top_10 %>%
  select(caldt, top_decile_equity = portfolio_equity) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_all_funds %>%
      select(caldt, all_funds_equity = portfolio_equity),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    df_qqq_equity,
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  arrange(caldt)

# plot 3 lines: top decile, all funds, qqq
ggplot(df_equity_curves, aes(x = caldt)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = top_decile_equity, color = "Top 10% Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = all_funds_equity, color = "All Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = qqq_equity, color = "QQQ Buy-and-Hold"), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "Top 10% Funds" = '#00BFC4',
  "All Funds" = '#F8766D',
  "QQQ Buy-and-Hold" = '#7CAE00'
)) +
  labs(
    title = "Equity Curve: Top 10% vs All Funds vs QQQ",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Equity",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal()



# combine top 10%, 25%, and 50% portfolios into one df for robustness plot
df_equity_cutoffs <- portfolio_top_10 %>%
  select(caldt, top_10_equity = portfolio_equity) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_top_25 %>%
      select(caldt, top_25_equity = portfolio_equity),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_top_50 %>%
      select(caldt, top_50_equity = portfolio_equity),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  arrange(caldt) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_all_funds %>%
      select(caldt, all_funds_equity = portfolio_equity),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  arrange(caldt) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_top_5 %>%
      select(caldt, top_5_equity = portfolio_equity),
    by = "caldt"
    ) %>%
  arrange(caldt)

# second plot robustness across different deciles
ggplot(df_equity_cutoffs, aes(x = caldt)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = top_5_equity, color = "Top 5% Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = top_10_equity, color = "Top 10% Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = top_25_equity, color = "Top 25% Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = top_50_equity, color = "Top 50% Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = all_funds_equity, color = "All Funds"), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
  "Top 5% Funds" = '#9467bd',
  "Top 10% Funds" = '#00BFC4',
  "Top 25% Funds" = '#ff7f0e',
  "Top 50% Funds" ='#F8766D',
  "All Funds" ='#7CAE00'
)) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 5% vs Top 10% vs Top 25% vs Top 50% vs All Funds",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Equity",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# read in ff5 + mom 
df_ff_mom = read.csv("../data/ff5_mom.csv") 
df_ff_mom = df_ff_mom %>%   mutate(
  dateff = dmy(dateff),       
) %>% mutate( caldt = dateff) %>%
  select(-dateff) %>% filter(year(caldt) >= 2020, year(caldt) <= 2025) 


# df that stores every single portfolio's equity, qqq equity and factors (calculate metrics like sharpe ratio)
df_returns_factors = portfolio_top_5 %>%
  select(caldt, 
         top5_equity = portfolio_equity,
         top5_return = portfolio_return
         ) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_top_10 %>%
      select(
        caldt,
        top10_equity = portfolio_equity,
        top10_return = portfolio_return
        ),
    by = "caldt"
    ) %>%
      full_join(
    portfolio_top_25 %>%
      select(
        caldt,
        top25_equity = portfolio_equity,
        top25_return = portfolio_return
      ),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_top_50 %>%
      select(
        caldt,
        top50_equity = portfolio_equity,
        top50_return = portfolio_return
      ),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    portfolio_all_funds %>%
      select(
        caldt,
        allfunds_equity = portfolio_equity,
        allfunds_return = portfolio_return
      ),
    by = "caldt"
  ) %>%
  left_join(df_ff_mom, by = "caldt") %>%
  left_join(df_qqq_equity, by = "caldt") %>%
  mutate(
    qqq_return = qqq_equity / lag(qqq_equity) - 1,
    top5_rexcess = top5_return - rf,
    top10_rexcess = top10_return - rf,
    top25_rexcess = top25_return - rf,
    top50_rexcess = top50_return - rf,
    allfunds_rexcess = allfunds_return - rf,
    qqq_rexcess = qqq_return - rf
  ) %>%
  arrange(caldt)


# regressions for each portfolio
fit_ff5_mom_top5 <- lm(
  top5_rexcess ~ mktrf + smb + hml + rmw + cma + umd,
  data = df_returns_factors
)

fit_ff5_mom_top10 <- lm(
  top10_rexcess ~ mktrf + smb + hml + rmw + cma + umd,
  data = df_returns_factors
)

fit_ff5_mom_top25 <- lm(
  top25_rexcess ~ mktrf + smb + hml + rmw + cma + umd,
  data = df_returns_factors
)

fit_ff5_mom_top50 <- lm(
  top50_rexcess ~ mktrf + smb + hml + rmw + cma + umd,
  data = df_returns_factors
)

fit_ff5_mom_allfunds <- lm(
  allfunds_rexcess ~ mktrf + smb + hml + rmw + cma + umd,
  data = df_returns_factors
)


# newey west se
nw_ff5_mom_top5 <- NeweyWest(fit_ff5_mom_top5, lag = 12, prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE)
nw_ff5_mom_top10 <- NeweyWest(fit_ff5_mom_top10, lag = 12, prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE)
nw_ff5_mom_top25 <- NeweyWest(fit_ff5_mom_top25, lag = 12, prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE)
nw_ff5_mom_top50 <- NeweyWest(fit_ff5_mom_top50, lag = 12, prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE)
nw_ff5_mom_allfunds <- NeweyWest(fit_ff5_mom_allfunds, lag = 12, prewhite = FALSE, adjust = TRUE)

coeftest(fit_ff5_mom_top5, vcov. = nw_ff5_mom_top5)
coeftest(fit_ff5_mom_top10, vcov. = nw_ff5_mom_top10)
coeftest(fit_ff5_mom_top25, vcov. = nw_ff5_mom_top25)
coeftest(fit_ff5_mom_top50, vcov. = nw_ff5_mom_top50)
coeftest(fit_ff5_mom_allfunds, vcov. = nw_ff5_mom_allfunds)
```

Metrics 
```{r}
# max drawdown
max_drawdown <- function(equity_c) {
  peak <- cummax(equity_c)
  drawdown <- (equity_c - peak) / peak
  min(drawdown, na.rm = TRUE)
}

# sharpe ratio
sharpe_r <- function(excess_returns) {
  mean(excess_returns, na.rm = TRUE) / sd(excess_returns, na.rm = TRUE) * sqrt(12)
}

# helper function to compute metrics for one portfolio
compute_metrics <- function(df, equity_col, return_col, rexcess_col, fit_obj, nw_obj, portfolio_name) {
  
  cum_ret <- prod(1 + df[[return_col]], na.rm = TRUE) - 1
  maxdd <- max_drawdown(df[[equity_col]])
  sharpe <- sharpe_r(df[[rexcess_col]])
  
  nw_test <- coeftest(fit_obj, vcov. = nw_obj)
  alpha_est <- nw_test["(Intercept)", "Estimate"]
  alpha_pval <- nw_test["(Intercept)", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  
  data.frame(
    Portfolio = portfolio_name,
    Cumulative_Return = round(cum_ret, 4),
    Max_Drawdown = round(maxdd, 4),
    Annualised_Sharpe_Ratio = round(sharpe, 3),
    Alpha_Intercept_Annualised = round(alpha_est * 12, 4),
    Alpha_p_value = round(alpha_pval, 4),
    Beats_Benchmark_5pct = as.integer(alpha_est > 0 & alpha_pval < 0.05),
    Beats_Benchmark_10pct = as.integer(alpha_est > 0 & alpha_pval < 0.10)
  )
}

metrics_top5 <- compute_metrics(
  df = df_returns_factors,
  equity_col = "top5_equity",
  return_col = "top5_return",
  rexcess_col = "top5_rexcess",
  fit_obj = fit_ff5_mom_top5,
  nw_obj = nw_ff5_mom_top5,
  portfolio_name = "Top 5%"
)

metrics_top10 <- compute_metrics(
  df = df_returns_factors,
  equity_col = "top10_equity",
  return_col = "top10_return",
  rexcess_col = "top10_rexcess",
  fit_obj = fit_ff5_mom_top10,
  nw_obj = nw_ff5_mom_top10,
  portfolio_name = "Top 10%"
)

metrics_top25 <- compute_metrics(
  df = df_returns_factors,
  equity_col = "top25_equity",
  return_col = "top25_return",
  rexcess_col = "top25_rexcess",
  fit_obj = fit_ff5_mom_top25,
  nw_obj = nw_ff5_mom_top25,
  portfolio_name = "Top 25%"
)

metrics_top50 <- compute_metrics(
  df = df_returns_factors,
  equity_col = "top50_equity",
  return_col = "top50_return",
  rexcess_col = "top50_rexcess",
  fit_obj = fit_ff5_mom_top50,
  nw_obj = nw_ff5_mom_top50,
  portfolio_name = "Top 50%"
)

metrics_allfunds <- compute_metrics(
  df = df_returns_factors,
  equity_col = "allfunds_equity",
  return_col = "allfunds_return",
  rexcess_col = "allfunds_rexcess",
  fit_obj = fit_ff5_mom_allfunds,
  nw_obj = nw_ff5_mom_allfunds,
  portfolio_name = "All Funds"
)

# benchmark metrics for qqq
cum_ret_qqq <- prod(1 + df_returns_factors$qqq_return, na.rm = TRUE) - 1
maxdd_qqq <- max_drawdown(df_returns_factors$qqq_equity)
sharpe_qqq <- sharpe_r(df_returns_factors$qqq_rexcess)

metrics_qqq <- data.frame(
  Portfolio = "QQQ",
  Cumulative_Return = round(cum_ret_qqq, 4),
  Max_Drawdown = round(maxdd_qqq, 4),
  Annualised_Sharpe_Ratio = round(sharpe_qqq, 3),
  Alpha_Intercept_Annualised = NA,
  Alpha_p_value = NA,
  Beats_Benchmark_5pct = NA,
  Beats_Benchmark_10pct = NA
)

metrics_df <- bind_rows(
  metrics_top5,
  metrics_top10,
  metrics_top25,
  metrics_top50,
  metrics_allfunds,
  metrics_qqq
)

metrics_df
```

```{r}
# Model-level metric, from df_for_dm_test
RMSE <- round(sqrt(mean((df_for_dm_test$actual_alpha - df_for_dm_test$predicted_alpha)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 6)
Total_Actual_Positive <- sum(df_for_dm_test$actual_alpha > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
Total_Predicted_Positive <- (sum(df_for_dm_test$predicted_alpha > 0, na.rm = TRUE))
True_Positive <- sum(df_for_dm_test$actual_alpha > 0 & df_for_dm_test$predicted_alpha > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
False_Positive <- sum(df_for_dm_test$actual_alpha < 0 & df_for_dm_test$predicted_alpha > 0, na.rm = TRUE)
False_Negative <- sum(df_for_dm_test$actual_alpha > 0 & df_for_dm_test$predicted_alpha < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
Precision <- round(True_Positive / Total_Predicted_Positive, 4)  # % of correct positive alphas predicted
Recall <- (True_Positive / Total_Actual_Positive) # of all actual positives, how many did we catch
Positive_Overpredict_Ratio <- round(Total_Predicted_Positive / Total_Actual_Positive, 4) # total no of positive alpha predicted / total no. of actual positive alphas

model_level_metrics <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("RMSE", "Total_Actual_Positive", "Total_Predicted_Positive",
             "True_Positive", "False_Positive", "False_Negative",
             "Precision", "Recall", "Positive_Overpredict_Ratio"),
  Value  = c(RMSE, Total_Actual_Positive, Total_Predicted_Positive,
             True_Positive, False_Positive, False_Negative,
             Precision, Recall, Positive_Overpredict_Ratio)
)
model_level_metrics
```
